instruction: The cloud service system, cloudbed-2, encountered two failures within the time range of March 20, 2022, from 15:30 to 16:00. You are tasked with identifying, for EACH failure, the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
groundtruth:

answer 2: component=node-6; reason=node CPU spike; datetime=2022-03-20 15:58:47
scoring_points:

The 1-th predicted root cause reason is node CPU load
The 2-th root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2022-03-20 15:58:47
The 2-th predicted root cause reason is node CPU spike
